title: The Straw Hats Break Through Totto Land
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Perospero, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Pudding, Unknown person #7, Luffy as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: pulled away by strings in a puppet show,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even that sweet luring neciar... like that of a heart that keeps getting heartier.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's nothing in this world more frightening than that mouth-water-ing sweetness.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like Shadows passing by one another, no one knows,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: hanging onto life by a thread, it's a monkey show.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's all a show of splendor. ]]

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As soon as Luffy and the others make it out of the territory, our work is done!!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Do what you always do, pudding.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Use your acting skills to make him completely fall in love.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, you're just like a little puppet, pudding!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: My own personal little Mari- onnette. 🙂

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't spout such idiotic non- sense!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If you knew how I truly am...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: nobody will ever love me. I'm nothing but a hideous monster.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please lift her veil and kiss her to seal your vows.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm glad that my fiancee... was you, pudding- chan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I HAVE JUST ONE LAST REQUEST...!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 42 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
